topic: Landing Page Conversion Audit — product.html, hq-product.html, reports/landing_page.html
bullets: === FILE: reports/landing_page.html (BEST — primary sales page) ===
STRENGTH: Full checkout modal with form (name, email, company) that POSTs to /api/pay via postToPay() function
STRENGTH: Stripe trust badge with SSL/guarantee messaging below pricing grid
STRENGTH: 3 testimonials with names, roles, and star ratings — good social proof
STRENGTH: Urgency elements — countdown timer, '7 early-access spots remaining', launch discount badges (40% off)
STRENGTH: Comparison table for Solo/Team/Enterprise tiers adds clarity
STRENGTH: Sticky mobile CTA bar at bottom for mobile users
STRENGTH: Monthly/annual billing toggle with 20% save badge
STRENGTH: Lifetime ($299) and Mac Mini Bundle ($1,499) specials with direct Stripe checkout via checkoutSpecial()
ISSUE: Checkout form collects name/email but submitCheckout() function is NOT defined in the script — form submission will fail silently or error
ISSUE: checkoutSpecial() calls postToPay() which POSTs to /api/pay — good, but openCheckout() only opens a modal with a form that calls submitCheckout() which is MISSING
ISSUE: Footer says 'SecondMind Ops' but brand elsewhere is 'Second Mind Labs Pty Ltd' — inconsistent branding
ISSUE: Privacy and Terms links are href='#' — dead links, erodes trust
ISSUE: Testimonials appear fabricated (generic names, no photos, no company links) — low credibility for sophisticated buyers
ISSUE: No live demo link or screenshot — buyers can't see the product before paying
ISSUE: FAQ section uses static open questions (no toggle/accordion JS) — all answers visible at once, long page
ISSUE: Hero CTA 'Start Free 14-Day Trial' opens Team checkout specifically — misleading if user wants Solo
=== FILE: product.html (WebIntel API page) ===
ISSUE: All CTAs link to '/buy' — this route is not defined anywhere in the codebase, likely a 404
ISSUE: No Stripe integration at all — no checkout flow, no /api/pay calls
ISSUE: Zero social proof — no testimonials, no customer logos, no usage stats
ISSUE: Enterprise plan uses 'mailto:hello@webintel.ai' — email domain doesn't match secondmindhq.com
ISSUE: Demo strip references 'api.webintel.ai' — this domain likely doesn't exist
ISSUE: 'SDKs for Python, Node, and Go coming soon' — vaporware language undermines confidence
ISSUE: Tech credibility section has duplicate emoji element (line 635: both <span> and <div> with same icon)
ISSUE: FAQ items have no toggle/accordion JS — the +/- indicator is CSS-only decoration
ISSUE: No pricing anchor — free tier gives 5 queries/month but no indication of value per query
ISSUE: Nav brand says 'WebIntel API' but footer says 'Second Mind Labs Pty Ltd' — brand confusion
=== FILE: hq-product.html (HQ waitlist page) ===
ISSUE: No pricing at all — only a waitlist email form, no revenue capture
ISSUE: Waitlist form POSTs to /api/waitlist — if endpoint doesn't exist, falls back to localStorage only (no actual capture)
ISSUE: '67/100 spots claimed' is hardcoded — fake scarcity with no backend validation
ISSUE: No testimonials or social proof whatsoever
ISSUE: CTA is 'Get Early Access' linking to waitlist — no path to payment
ISSUE: Nav links point to agent-command-centre.html (internal dashboard), not appropriate for external visitors
ISSUE: Hero stats ('12 AI Agents', '$0 Salaries') are product metrics, not social proof
=== CROSS-CUTTING ISSUES ===
CRITICAL: submitCheckout() function is missing in landing_page.html — the main conversion path is broken
CRITICAL: product.html CTAs all point to /buy which doesn't exist — all conversion paths broken
HIGH: Three separate product pages with different branding, pricing, and value propositions create confusion
HIGH: No unified Stripe checkout integration across product.html — only landing_page.html has /api/pay
HIGH: Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages don't exist (all href='#')
MEDIUM: No A/B testing or analytics tracking visible on any page
MEDIUM: product.html has no mobile hamburger menu — nav links will overflow on small screens
MEDIUM: hq-product.html hides nav-links entirely on mobile (<700px) with no hamburger alternative
LOW: Scanline overlay on all pages (body::after) may cause rendering performance issues on low-end devices
LOW: Font loading — product.html uses <link> preconnect, hq-product.html uses @import (slower, render-blocking)
sources: reports/landing_page.html — primary sales/conversion page with checkout modal
recommendations: 1. URGENT: Implement the missing submitCheckout() function in landing_page.html — this is the #1 conversion blocker
2. URGENT: Replace all /buy links in product.html with either openCheckout() calls or direct /api/pay integration
3. Consolidate to ONE primary sales page (landing_page.html is strongest) and redirect the others
4. Add real testimonials with photos, company names, and verifiable details — or remove fake ones
5. Create actual Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages
6. Add product screenshots or a live demo embed to build confidence before checkout
7. Standardize branding: pick either 'SecondMind Ops' or 'Second Mind Labs' and use it everywhere
8. Add Google Analytics / Plausible / PostHog for conversion tracking
9. Fix the duplicate emoji HTML in product.html tech section (line 635)
10. Add hamburger menu to product.html for mobile responsiveness
11. Wire up hq-product.html waitlist to a real backend (or redirect to landing_page.html pricing)
12. Add meta OG tags for social sharing on all pages
